text.title: puppeteer-agent-workflow Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for puppeteer-agent-workflow as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: waitForTimeout was deprecated and removed in Puppeteer 22. Replace with new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, N)) or a targeted waitForSelector/waitForFunction.

failure-mode.description: LLMs default to waitUntil: 'networkidle0' on every page.goto().
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: networkidle0 hangs forever on auth/analytics-heavy pages and SPAs with WebSocket/SSE. Force domcontentloaded + targeted waits in prompts and code review.

failure-mode.description: Selectors generated from screenshots (e.g. nth-child positions, visual class names).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Positional selectors break on any layout or content change. Require the agent to fetch DOM via page.content() first and use attribute-based selectors (data-testid, id, name).

failure-mode.description: Credentials, cookies, or filled form data written to log files or stdout without scrubbing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Automated pipelines that log full page state or network HAR will leak session tokens. Pair with a password-scrubber step before persisting any artifacts.

failure-mode.description: Fully automated loops on login forms, CAPTCHA challenges, or 2FA prompts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Any flow involving credentials or 2FA must pause and surface a screenshot for human review; never let the agent loop silently on an auth wall.
